requirement_topic.en: Timor-Leste Grid Connection — 220/380 V 50 Hz, IEC 62116 / IEC 61727, and Project-Specific Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 东帝汶并网——220/380 V 50 Hz、IEC 62116 / IEC 61727及项目专属设置
requirement_topic.zht: 東帝汶併網——220/380 V 50 Hz、IEC 62116 / IEC 61727及項目專屬設置

summary.en: Solar PV inverter projects in Timor-Leste should be treated as ANE/EDTL project-review items with interconnection conditions, technical inspection, and commissioning acceptance. Timor-Leste's low-voltage context is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, which genuinely aligns with China's nominal value and frequency. This helps with basic configuration but does not replace local project-specific parameters such as frequency windows, protection settings, harmonics, metering, and communications.
summary.zh: 东帝汶光伏逆变器项目应按ANE/EDTL项目审查事项处理，包括并网条件、技术验收和调试认可。东帝汶低压系统为220/380 V、50 Hz，名义上与中国一致，这有利于基础配置，但不能替代项目专属参数，如频率保护窗口、保护设置、谐波、计量和通信。
summary.zht: 東帝汶光伏逆變器項目應按ANE/EDTL項目審查事項處理，包括併網條件、技術驗收及調試認可。東帝汶低壓系統為220/380 V、50 Hz，名義上與中國一致，這有助於基礎配置，但不能替代專案專屬參數，如頻率保護窗口、保護設定、諧波、計量及通訊。

standards_or_laws: ANE/EDTL project-specific grid-connection and commissioning requirements in Timor-Leste
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 37408-2021, and assumes 220/380 V 50 Hz systems. For Timor-Leste, this is a useful electrical baseline but must be complemented with ANE/EDTL project acceptance terms and local commissioning requirements.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器常见证据包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021，默认基于220/380 V 50 Hz系统。对东帝汶而言这构成有用的电气基线，但仍需补充ANE/EDTL项目验收条款与当地调试要求。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器常見證據包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021，預設基於220/380 V 50 Hz系統。對東帝汶而言這構成有用電氣基線，但仍需補充ANE/EDTL項目驗收條款與當地調試要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求

gap.en: Gap: project files should add ANE/EDTL acceptance scope, commissioning tests, and local protection coordination. Nominal voltage and frequency alignment is advantageous, but not sufficient. For import planning, include heat/humidity assumptions from Timor-Leste deployment points and confirm whether grid commissioning is on public or private network.
gap.zh: 差距：项目文件应补充ANE/EDTL验收范围、调试测试及本地保护配合。名义电压和频率对齐有利，但不足够。进口规划中应加入东帝汶部署点的温湿度假设，并确认并网对象是公共网络还是工业私网。
gap.zht: 差距：專案文件應補充ANE/EDTL驗收範圍、調試測試及本地保護配合。名義電壓和頻率對齊有利，但不足夠。進口規劃中應納入東帝汶部署點的溫溼度假設，並確認併網對象是公共網路還是工業私網。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected PV projects where ANE/EDTL project acceptance applies; voltage/frequency match is supportive but not sufficient
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese documents are domestic support only

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Timor-Leste, 220/380 V 50 Hz grid alignment with China is a good starting point. Compliance is still decided by ANE/EDTL project acceptance requirements, especially protection coordination, reactive requirements, metering, communications, and commissioning readiness in each site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对东帝汶而言，220/380 V 50 Hz与中国一致是良好的起点。合规仍由ANE/EDTL项目验收决定，特别是保护协调、无功、计量、通信及各场站调试准备程度。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對東帝汶而言，220/380 V 50 Hz與中國一致是良好起點。合規仍由ANE/EDTL項目驗收決定，尤其是保護協調、無功、計量、通訊及各場站調試準備情況。
